author: logonoff
description: Adds Discord-like syntax for inline spoilers.

manifest.author: logonoff
manifest.description: Adds Discord-like syntax for inline spoilers.
manifest.name: Inline spoilers

name: Inline spoilers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release is identical to 1.2.6 except there's no more scary "missing release attestation" warning on the Obsidian community page

## Changes
- Tech debt: update plugin template boilerplate 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.6...1.2.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Tech debt: bump vulnerable `devDependencies`
- Tech debt: use obsidian helper when creating spoiler fragments

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.5...1.2.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed regression made in 1.2.4 where clicking a spoiler didn't reveal it
- Tech debt: adopt `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` and add a GitHub action for linting

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.4...1.2.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed the UI being recoloured in Obsidian for macOS when **Reveal all spoilers** is enabled. (https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/issues/19)
- Tech debt: bumped all dev dependencies and disabled postinstall scripts in light of npm worm

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- README changes 
- Tech debt: Bump all dependencies to latest
- Tech debt: enable TypeScript strict mode

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed regression where **Reveal all spoilers** didn't always work

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.1.2...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added experimental support for editor mode. Enable the **Hide spoilers in editor view (experimental)** option in the plugin settings to use it.
- License is now GPLv3 or newer from now on
- Builds are now minified

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Initial release accepted by Obsidian community plugins!
- Fixed regression where bold and italics stop working sometimes

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- Reduced probability of XSS attack occurring
- Updated README.md

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/logonoff/obsidian-inline-spoilers/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
